title: Regulations under the National Vocational Training Act, 1994
title_en: Regulations under the National Vocational Training Act, 1994

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these regulations, and in the forms in the Annexure, unless the context otherwise indicates, any word or expression to which a meaning has been assigned in the National Vocational Training Act, 1994, shall have the same meaning and- “ the Act ” means the said National Vocational Training Act, 1994 (Act 18 of 1994 ). [The National Vocational Training Act 18 of 1994 has been replaced by the Vocational Education and Training Act 1 of 2008 .]

provisions.title: Contracts of apprenticeship
provisions.content: A contract of apprenticeship contemplated in section 19 of the Act shall be in the form of Form 1.

provisions.title: Transfer of contract of apprenticeship
provisions.content: The transfer of a contract of apprenticeship under section 20 of the Act shall be effected in the form of Form 2.

provisions.title: Termination of contract of apprenticeship
provisions.content: The notification of the termination of a contract of apprenticeship- (a) by mutual understanding as contemplated in section 22 of the Act ; (b) during probation as contemplated in section 23 of the Act , shall be in the form of Form 3 and Form 4, respectively.

provisions.title: Records of apprentices
provisions.content: The records to be kept of an apprentice in terms of section 25 of the Act shall be in the form of Form 5.

provisions.title: Particulars of supervisors
provisions.content: The particulars of supervisors contemplated in paragraphs (a) and (b) of section 28(1) of the Act shall be submitted in the form of Form 6.

provisions.title: Repeal
provisions.content: The regulations made under the Apprenticeship Ordinance, 1938 ( Ordinance 12 of 1938 ), are hereby repealed. ANNEXURE FORMS [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced] History of this document 15 November 2017 this version Consolidation 06 September 1996 Published in Government Gazette 1399 01 September 1996 Commenced Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
